name: Greenland Resort Company Limited
summary: Greenland Resort Company Limited engages in the tourism and inn businesses in Japan. The company manages amusement parks, golf courses, and sports facilities. It is also involved in restaurant management and real estate businesses. The company was formerly known as Greenland Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Greenland Resort Company Limited in July 2006. Greenland Resort Company Limited was founded in 1964 and is based in Arao, Japan.
